overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a journey through the Badlands wasteland. The camera emerges from behind cover to circle an abandoned station wagon, then traverses a vast scrap metal field toward the distant Night City skyline. After a fade to black, the scene shifts to a different wasteland location featuring a futuristic pickup truck, which the camera circles before moving down a dirt road past roadside shacks.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the camera positioned behind a large container in a desert wasteland. As it moves past the obstruction, an abandoned station wagon is revealed in the center of the frame. The camera circles the vehicle, showing the rocky hillsides with Joshua trees on the left and the distant futuristic city skyline of Night City ahead. The environment is overcast and desolate, with scattered industrial debris visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: scrap metal debris field leading to city

terrain becomes increasingly covered with metal debris forming a valley of scrap

valley filled with scrap metal creating a path toward the city

segments.scene_description: The camera leaves the abandoned car behind and proceeds forward through a massive debris field. The ground is covered with scrap metal and wreckage, forming a valley that leads toward the distant Night City skyline. The rocky hillsides give way to an open expanse of discarded metal and technology. The city buildings appear gradually larger as the camera advances through the treacherous terrain.

events.description: fade from black to new location with futuristic pickup truck
completing circle around truck and beginning to move down the dirt road

agents.ego_description: circling a futuristic pickup truck then proceeding down a dirt road past roadside structures

notable_agents.action: futuristic armored pickup truck with roof rack and off-road modifications

entered.detail: wooden and corrugated metal shacks lining the dirt road
wooden power poles with wires stretching along the roadside
unpaved road leading through the wasteland settlement

segments.scene_description: After a fade to black, the scene opens on a different wasteland location featuring a large, dark red futuristic pickup truck. The camera circles the vehicle, showing its armored design and roof-mounted equipment, then proceeds down a dirt road past wooden shacks and utility poles. The Night City skyline remains visible in the distance to the left, while Joshua trees line the roadside. The environment suggests a sparse settlement on the outskirts of the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a desolate wasteland that transitions from an abandoned industrial graveyard to a sparse roadside settlement. It begins behind a large container in an overcast desert, moving past the obstruction to circle an abandoned station wagon set against rocky hillsides and the distant Night City skyline. As the camera leaves the vehicle behind, the terrain shifts into a massive valley of scrap metal and wreckage, advancing through the debris field as the city buildings gradually loom larger. Following a brief fade to black, the scene opens on a different wasteland location where the camera circles a dark red futuristic pickup truck before proceeding down a dirt road. The movement finally carries the viewer past wooden shacks and utility poles, with Joshua trees lining the path toward the distant skyline.
